response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. No vocal music detected in this segment as per reference JSON. 2. Reference JSON correctly identifies the scene as gameplay commentary. 3. Timing is precisely synced to the rapid dialogue of the VTubers and the game's countdown sequences. 4. Japanese dialogue from Shiori Novella is transcribed and translated. 5. Subtitle blocks are split to respect the 50-character limit and logical audio pauses.

subtitles.original: And two more over there! They are gacha.
subtitles.english: And two more over there! They are gacha.

subtitles.original: Oh, you either gain points or lose points...
subtitles.english: Oh, you either gain points or lose points...

subtitles.original: ...but you don't know, so it's a risk every time!
subtitles.english: ...but you don't know, so it's a risk every time!

subtitles.original: Gacha! Yeah! And then...
subtitles.english: Gacha! Yeah! And then...

subtitles.original: ...there is the big Moai! The big Moai!
subtitles.english: ...there is the big Moai! The big Moai!

subtitles.original: It will block your path. Oh! Whoa! Hi!
subtitles.english: It will block your path. Oh! Whoa! Hi!

subtitles.original: It is minus 20 points if you hit it...
subtitles.english: It is minus 20 points if you hit it...

subtitles.original: ...so don't hit it. Or hit it if you want.
subtitles.english: ...so don't hit it. Or hit it if you want.

subtitles.original: Yeah, don't hit it! And then, the Pebble!
subtitles.english: Yeah, don't hit it! And then, the Pebble!

subtitles.original: Look at the Pebble! I have...
subtitles.english: Look at the Pebble! I have...

subtitles.original: ...kidnapped one of my Pebbles...
subtitles.english: ...kidnapped one of my Pebbles...

subtitles.original: ...to use as a sacrifice. If you hit it...
subtitles.english: ...to use as a sacrifice. If you hit it...

subtitles.original: ...minus 5 points. But you know what...
subtitles.english: ...minus 5 points. But you know what...

subtitles.original: ...I don't think they would mind if you hit it.
subtitles.english: ...I don't think they would mind if you hit it.

subtitles.original: To be honest. Okay, yeah!
subtitles.english: To be honest. Okay, yeah!

subtitles.original: And the items will change depending on...
subtitles.english: And the items will change depending on...

subtitles.original: ...your first lap or second lap.
subtitles.english: ...your first lap or second lap.

subtitles.original: You're doing two laps. Two laps! Okay!
subtitles.english: You're doing two laps. Two laps! Okay!

subtitles.original: By the way, too many! You can run another laps?
subtitles.english: By the way, too many! You can run another laps?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Are you okay? Yeah, I'm great!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Are you okay? Yeah, I'm great!

subtitles.original: I guess time to show you how it's done.
subtitles.english: I guess time to show you how it's done.

subtitles.original: Sure, go on, go on! Alright, first lap!
subtitles.english: Sure, go on, go on! Alright, first lap!

subtitles.original: Show us how to do it! I'm ready!
subtitles.english: Show us how to do it! I'm ready!

subtitles.original: Go! You're so fast! Oh, first lap!
subtitles.english: Go! You're so fast! Oh, first lap!

subtitles.original: She gets a crystal, she makes a loop!
subtitles.english: She gets a crystal, she makes a loop!

subtitles.original: Second crystal! Watch out, watch out!
subtitles.english: Second crystal! Watch out, watch out!

subtitles.original: She's going so fast! Zombie's speeding up!
subtitles.english: She's going so fast! Zombie's speeding up!

subtitles.original: Second lap, let's go! Another crystal!
subtitles.english: Second lap, let's go! Another crystal!

subtitles.original: She hit another one! Moai! The zombie!
subtitles.english: She hit another one! Moai! The zombie!

subtitles.original: Go, go, go, go, go! The zombie is speeding up!
subtitles.english: Go, go, go, go, go! The zombie is speeding up!

subtitles.original: The crystal at the end... minus 3 pt. Yeah!
subtitles.english: The crystal at the end... minus 3 pt. Yeah!

subtitles.original: I think you got a bit of bad luck...
subtitles.english: I think you got a bit of bad luck...

subtitles.original: ...with that crystal at the end.
subtitles.english: ...with that crystal at the end.

subtitles.original: It's okay, that was a pretty good run.
subtitles.english: It's okay, that was a pretty good run.

subtitles.original: You went so fast! You almost hit the zombie...
subtitles.english: You went so fast! You almost hit the zombie...

subtitles.original: ...but you're okay! Yeah, you didn't die!
subtitles.english: ...but you're okay! Yeah, you didn't die!

subtitles.original: How many points did I get? How many points?
subtitles.english: How many points did I get? How many points?

subtitles.original: That's a good question. How many points...
subtitles.english: That's a good question. How many points...

subtitles.original: ...did you get? I think you got one point.
subtitles.english: ...did you get? I think you got one point.

subtitles.original: What? One point? Oh, wasn't that negative?
subtitles.english: What? One point? Oh, wasn't that negative?

subtitles.original: Did I have bad gacha luck? It's okay.
subtitles.english: Did I have bad gacha luck? It's okay.

subtitles.original: It's a group effort, we can still get points.
subtitles.english: It's a group effort, we can still get points.

subtitles.original: Yeah, I contributed one! One is great!
subtitles.english: Yeah, I contributed one! One is great!

subtitles.original: We'll let the pro do all the work for you, right?
subtitles.english: We'll let the pro do all the work for you, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah! Pro Mococo! Yeah, yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah! Pro Mococo! Yeah, yeah!

subtitles.original: I'm counting on you guys! Okay!
subtitles.english: I'm counting on you guys! Okay!

subtitles.original: Next up is... Shiori! Show us how it's done!
subtitles.english: Next up is... Shiori! Show us how it's done!

subtitles.original: Our fearless leader! I have a plan.
subtitles.english: Our fearless leader! I have a plan.

subtitles.original: You have a plan? What's your plan?
subtitles.english: You have a plan? What's your plan?

subtitles.original: You'll figure it out when I say 'Plan'.
subtitles.english: You'll figure it out when I say 'Plan'.

subtitles.original: Okay, good luck, Shiori! Shiori!
subtitles.english: Okay, good luck, Shiori! Shiori!

subtitles.original: あの、あの、ゾンビら... 先どうぞ？
subtitles.english: Um, um, zombies... go ahead?

subtitles.original: え？ 何？ はい。 行こうですね、行こうですね。
subtitles.english: Eh? What? Yes. Let's go, let's go.

subtitles.original: You got this! 3... 2... 1...
subtitles.english: You got this! 3... 2... 1...

subtitles.original: Let's go! GO! Let's go! You're so...
subtitles.english: Let's go! GO! Let's go! You're so...

subtitles.original: Yeah, that's like a... no! Come on, let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's like a... no! Come on, let's go!

subtitles.original: Oh! Crystal... minus 1 pt. Touch me! Hit me!
subtitles.english: Oh! Crystal... minus 1 pt. Touch me! Hit me!

subtitles.original: Watch me! Watch me! Watch me! Moai!
subtitles.english: Watch me! Watch me! Watch me! Moai!

subtitles.original: No, no, no, no! Yeah, the zombie! Go, go, go!
subtitles.english: No, no, no, no! Yeah, the zombie! Go, go, go!

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah, yeah! Look at her go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah! Look at her go!

subtitles.original: She's like driving in New York!
subtitles.english: She's like driving in New York!

subtitles.original: Only taking points! That's okay.
subtitles.english: Only taking points! That's okay.

subtitles.original: I can figure it out. How many points did she...
subtitles.english: I can figure it out. How many points did she...

subtitles.original: Oh! Watch out! Okay, okay, okay!
subtitles.english: Oh! Watch out! Okay, okay, okay!

subtitles.original: You can't figure it out... oh! No!
subtitles.english: You can't figure it out... oh! No!

subtitles.original: Minus 3 pt. You didn't catch him...
subtitles.english: Minus 3 pt. You didn't catch him...

subtitles.original: ...but you sure gave him a run for his money.
subtitles.english: ...but you sure gave him a run for his money.

subtitles.original: Look at that driving! It's not about the points.
subtitles.english: Look at that driving! It's not about the points.

subtitles.original: I just wanted to run them over. Understandable.
subtitles.english: I just wanted to run them over. Understandable.

subtitles.original: It's okay, how many points did I get?
subtitles.english: It's okay, how many points did I get?

subtitles.original: Let's see... Three points! Oh, three points!
subtitles.english: Let's see... Three points! Oh, three points!

subtitles.original: That's two more points than Bijou!
subtitles.english: That's two more points than Bijou!

subtitles.original: No, that's pretty good. Better than one!
subtitles.english: No, that's pretty good. Better than one!

subtitles.original: So we have four! Alright, it's up to Fuwa...
subtitles.english: So we have four! Alright, it's up to Fuwa...

subtitles.original: ...do you think you can do it?
subtitles.english: ...do you think you can do it?

subtitles.original: I'll get four more points! You can do it!
subtitles.english: I'll get four more points! You can do it!

subtitles.original: I know you can! Yeah! I'm gonna tell you...
subtitles.english: I know you can! Yeah! I'm gonna tell you...

subtitles.original: ...the zombie is not gonna run away anymore.
subtitles.english: ...the zombie is not gonna run away anymore.

subtitles.original: I think it's tired. It's up to you!
subtitles.english: I think it's tired. It's up to you!

subtitles.original: You gotta outrun it! I'm the best driver! Yeah!
subtitles.english: You gotta outrun it! I'm the best driver! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Go! Let's go, Fuwawa! Oh no, you're going slow!
subtitles.english: Go! Let's go, Fuwawa! Oh no, you're going slow!

subtitles.original: What do you mean? I want to go faster!
subtitles.english: What do you mean? I want to go faster!

subtitles.original: This is very safe driving! Yeah, yeah!
subtitles.english: This is very safe driving! Yeah, yeah!

subtitles.original: You missed the crystal! It's okay...
subtitles.english: You missed the crystal! It's okay...

subtitles.original: ...the zombie's taking its time too!
subtitles.english: ...the zombie's taking its time too!
